title: Green Energy Open Access Rules, 2022
description: Reduced open access transaction limit from 1 MW to 100 kW for green energy consumers; mandated time-bound approvals within 15 days

title: CERC (Connectivity and GNA) Regulations, 2023
description: Simplified General Network Access framework replacing long-term access; enables flexible transmission for RE generators

title: Renewable Purchase Obligation (RPO) Trajectory 2022–2030
description: Mandated RPO targets rising to 43% by 2030 including energy storage obligation; separate solar, non-solar, and hydro RPO

title: National Green Hydrogen Mission
description: ₹19,744 crore mission targeting 5 MMT annual green hydrogen production by 2030; includes SIGHT programme for electrolyzer manufacturing

title: CERC DSM Regulations, 2022 (Amendment 2024)
description: Revised deviation settlement mechanism with new penalty framework for renewable generators; introduced forecasting accuracy incentives

title: Energy Conservation (Amendment) Act, 2022
description: Introduced carbon credit trading, expanded energy conservation building code, mandated use of non-fossil energy sources

title: PM-KUSUM Scheme — Phase II Extension
description: Extended deadline for Component-A (10 GW decentralized solar) and Component-C (solarization of agricultural pumps) to March 2026

title: BCD on Solar Cells & Modules — 40%/25%
description: Basic Customs Duty of 40% on solar modules and 25% on solar cells effective April 2022; aimed at boosting domestic manufacturing

title: ISTS Charges Waiver Extension for RE Projects
description: Extended inter-state transmission system charges and losses waiver for solar, wind, and hybrid projects commissioned before June 2025

title: Indian Carbon Market Rules, 2023 (Draft)
description: Draft framework for compliance and voluntary carbon credit market under Energy Conservation Act; designates BEE as administrator

title: Offshore Wind Energy Lease Rules, 2024
description: Framework for leasing seabed for offshore wind projects; 37 GW target along Gujarat and Tamil Nadu coasts

title: Battery Energy Storage Systems (BESS) Guidelines
description: Regulatory guidelines for grid-connected battery storage including tariff norms, performance standards, and ancillary services participation

title: National Electricity Plan 2023 — RE Integration
description: Projected 500 GW non-fossil capacity by 2030; outlines transmission corridor expansion and flexible generation requirements

title: PLI Scheme — Solar PV Manufacturing (Tranche II)
description: ₹19,500 crore incentive for integrated solar cell and module manufacturing with 65 GW fully integrated capacity target

title: CERC RE Tariff Regulations FY26–30
description: New normative tariff framework for wind, solar, and hybrid projects including updated CUF benchmarks and O&M escalation norms
